description: A vertically-formatted designed 'rogues-gallery' style card from the White House. The darkened background photo shows a handcuffed Black man in a black graphic T-shirt (a muscle-car 'Trans Am'-style print reading 'FUTURE DRIVE IN YOUR COUNTRY') being escorted by officers down what appears to be a corridor/loading area. Inset over it, in a white rounded frame with a drop shadow, is a booking/mugshot of the same man against a cinderblock wall with a partial red 'M' (a mugshot backdrop). Across the lower-middle is a bold red rectangle with large white sans-serif capitals: 'ARRESTED.' Below, in heavy white sans-serif capitals, the headline reads: 'Illegal Alien Violently Kills Innocent Mother Outside Gas Station in Florida.' The 'THE WHITE HOUSE' wordmark with building icon is centered at the bottom. The accompanying tweet names the man as Rolbert Joachin, an 'illegal alien released into the U.S. under Biden.' Propaganda technique: fear appeal and crime-spotlight framing using a mugshot 'BUSTED/ARRESTED' aesthetic to associate immigration with violent crime and to credit the administration with bringing offenders to justice while blaming the prior administration. Target audience is supporters of aggressive immigration enforcement.
notable_text: ARRESTED. Illegal Alien Violently Kills Innocent Mother Outside Gas Station in Florida.
